---
name: Trigger report
about: Report a trigger pattern (food, smell, physical, stress, etc.)
title: '[trigger] '
labels: trigger-report
---

## Trigger

- **Category:** (food / smell-VOC / physical / stress / infection / toxin / hormonal / medication / other)
- **Specific trigger:** (e.g. "perfumes", "aged cheese", "hot showers", "morphine")

## Pattern

- Onset after exposure: (minutes / hours)
- Duration:
- Symptom pattern: (skin / GI / respiratory / neuro / cardiovascular)
- Cumulative dose effect? (yes / no / not sure)
- Anything that blunts it: (compounds, environment, time of day)

## Suspected pathway

If you have a guess at the mechanism (MRGPRX2, FcεRI, histamine liberator,
substance P, etc.), share it. Not required.

## Anonymized data

You do not have to share anything personally identifying. We are interested in
the trigger pattern itself.

---
> ⚠️ This is hypothesis-generation only — not medical advice. We never solicit
> personal medical records via issues.
